# Billing API

Manage subscriptions and AI dispatch credits.

## Subscription Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/billing/checkout` | Create checkout session |
| GET | `/api/billing/subscription` | Get subscription details |
| PUT | `/api/billing/subscription` | Update subscription |
| GET | `/api/billing/portal` | Open customer portal |

## Credits

AI dispatch optimization uses a credit-based system.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/credits/balance` | Get credit balance |
| GET | `/api/credits/history` | View transaction history |
| POST | `/api/credits/purchase` | Purchase more credits |
